title: Intent
description: Contract for a Weekend Agent automation intent. Consumed by the Step 3b YAML generator after resolver validation.

kind.description: Intent kind. Only 'automation' is supported in v1. 'scene' and 'theme' are reserved for future versions.

name.description: Human-readable name for the automation. Non-empty string.

description.description: Optional longer description of what the automation does.

actions.description: Ordered list of service calls. Must contain at least one action.

triggers.description: Optional HA-style trigger definitions. Permissive for forward compatibility.

conditions.description: Optional HA-style condition definitions. Permissive for forward compatibility.

Action.description: A single HA service call within the automation.

service.description: Home Assistant service to call, in domain.service format (e.g. 'light.turn_on').

targets.description: Array of human-friendly names. The resolver MUST be called to convert these to entity_ids before YAML generation.

entity_ids.description: Array of fully-qualified HA entity IDs (e.g. 'light.office_lights'). Use when entity_id is already known. If both targets and entity_ids are present, entity_ids takes precedence.

data.description: Optional service call data payload (e.g. brightness, transition). Passed through to YAML verbatim.

Trigger.description: Home Assistant trigger definition. Permissive — any additional fields allowed for forward compatibility.

Condition.description: Home Assistant condition definition. Permissive — any additional fields allowed for forward compatibility.

Metadata.description: Optional metadata hints used by the generator and resolver. Not emitted into YAML.

area_hint.description: Preferred HA area name. Passed as area_hint to resolver.

domain_hint.description: Preferred HA domain. Passed as domain_hint to resolver.

source_ui.description: Identifier of the UI surface that produced this intent (e.g. 'weekend-agent-panel'). Used for audit/tracing only.
